channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: MoonshotAI /kimi-cli | Python | N/A
item.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

item.title: codecrafters-io /build-your-own-x | Markdown | N/A
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: KnockOutEZ /wigolo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: tirth8205 /code-review-graph | Python | N/A
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: PostHog /posthog | Python | N/A
item.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

item.title: apache /ossie | Python | N/A
item.description: Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data

item.title: Robbyant /lingbot-map | Python | N/A
item.description: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data
